package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_cut: `bytes.SplitAfterN(..., 2)[0]` instead of a two-part `bytes.Cut(...)` flow.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario463Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return len(bytes.SplitN(haystack, needle, 2)[0]) >= 0
}
